params.name: flightHeight
params.description: The Z coordinate the heli tries to maintain (i.e. 30 == 30 meters above sea level).

params.name: minHeightAboveTerrain
params.description: The height in meters that the heli will try to stay above terrain (ie 20 == always tries to stay at least 20 meters above ground).
